name: AgentOps Curation Feedback Governance Canary
description: Offline public canary for the post-ingestion knowledge quality loop: pool promotion, human gates, curation verification, maturity transitions, citation feedback, metrics reporting, contradiction detection, and deduplication.

cases.title: curation, pool, maturity, feedback, metrics, contradiction, and dedup tests pass
cases.objective: Protect the behavior that decides whether captured knowledge is promoted, reviewed, rewarded, demoted, rejected, merged, or surfaced as a contradiction.

cases.title: curation and feedback CLI surfaces expose help
cases.objective: Ensure the operator can discover the command surfaces that inspect, promote, curate, reward, report, deduplicate, and diagnose knowledge quality.

inputs.shell: tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; (cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go build -o "$tmp/ao" ./cmd/ao); "$tmp/ao" pool --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" pool batch-promote --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" gate --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" curate --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" maturity --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" feedback --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" feedback-loop --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" batch-feedback --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" metrics cite --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" metrics cite-report --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" contradict --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" dedup --help >/dev/null; "$tmp/ao" session-outcome --help >/dev/null

cases.title: generated CLI docs expose curation and feedback governance commands
cases.objective: Keep public CLI docs aligned with the command surfaces for quality pool governance, human review gates, curation, maturity, feedback, metrics, contradiction, and dedup.

cases.title: source contracts preserve post-ingestion quality rules
cases.objective: Lock the source-level rules that prevent unreviewed, uncited, stale, harmful, duplicate, or contradictory knowledge from silently entering the long-term corpus.

expectations.value: Move a candidate from pending to staged status.

cases.title: product docs preserve curation and feedback loop intent
cases.objective: Ensure the public product contract still describes curation, quality measurement, feedback, and promotion as part of the compounding control plane.

expectations.value: Knowledge Flywheel — `/retro` → `/forge` → `/harvest` → `ao lookup` / `ao context assemble`, tiered promotion (learning → pattern → rule)
Each agent is an experiment. Each experiment produces data. The data gets curated.
Existing pool pipeline: pending -> staged -> promoted
After promotion, artifacts enter the MemRL utility tracking system.
